About Rotata

We design the systems behind B2B growth

Rotata exists to bring structure where growth has become hard to measure, scale or explain.

Talk about your structure Solutions
Data modelclean
Pipelinevisible
Automationcontrolled

Architecture

Who we are

Rotata is a B2B growth system company. We design and implement the structure behind marketing, sales, CRM, data and automation so teams can operate from one commercial reality.

  • B2B companies with complex sales cycles
  • Teams using HubSpot or preparing to implement it
  • Sales and marketing leaders who need cleaner pipeline visibility
  • Founders who need growth to become operationally repeatable

Diagnosis

Why we exist

Most companies do not fail because they lack tools. They fail because every tool follows a different logic. Rotata exists to turn disconnected activity into a controlled system.

  • Less improvisation
  • Fewer disconnected campaigns
  • Cleaner handoffs
  • Decisions based on the same data model

System

What Rotata builds

We build the operating layer that allows demand generation, outbound, CRM, reporting and account intelligence to work together.

Commercial architecture

Lifecycle stages, pipeline logic, handoffs and reporting designed around how revenue actually moves.

CRM and data structure

Fields, properties, lists, segmentation and dashboards that support decisions instead of creating noise.

Automation systems

Workflows, routing and follow-up that reduce manual friction while keeping human control.

Acquisition systems

Outbound, content, SEO and account intelligence connected to conversion and pipeline.

Process

Our approach

We do not begin with a software recommendation. We begin with diagnosis, then design the system, implement it, and optimize it with measured feedback.

  1. Diagnose current structure
  2. Design the target operating system
  3. Implement CRM, data and automation
  4. Optimize around pipeline evidence

Architecture

Mission

Our mission is to make B2B growth more structured, measurable and controllable for companies that depend on marketing and sales alignment.

  • Structure before scale
  • Evidence before opinion
  • Systems before isolated tactics

Measurement

Vision

Rotata should be the partner companies call when growth activity exists, but the system behind it is not yet clear enough to scale.

  • Clear CRM architecture
  • Connected growth workflows
  • Reliable reporting
  • Revenue teams working from one source of truth

Architecture

Values

The work is technical, but the principles are simple: clarity, precision, accountability and measurable outcomes.

  • Clarity in decisions
  • Precision in execution
  • Accountability in measurement
  • Respect for the buyer journey

Architecture

Clients we are built for

Rotata is designed for B2B organizations where pipeline quality, CRM discipline and commercial process matter.

  • SaaS and IT companies
  • B2B service companies
  • Sales-led businesses
  • Marketing-led teams
  • RevOps and CRM owners

System

How the work looks

The output is not a presentation. It is a working system: CRM structure, workflows, dashboards, data rules, content flows and commercial operating rhythm.

  • Architecture map
  • Implementation backlog
  • Configured CRM workflows
  • Reporting dashboards
  • Optimization cadence

Platforms

Technology stack

Tools support the system. We work with leading platforms when they serve the operating model.

HubSpot

CRM, marketing automation and reporting

Explore

ZoomInfo

B2B data intelligence and account targeting

Explore

La Growth Machine

Multichannel outbound sequencing

Explore

Synapsale

Account engagement signals and prioritization

Explore

Architecture

Leadership and operating model

Rotata works as a senior implementation partner: strategic enough to diagnose the system, technical enough to build it, and practical enough to keep it usable.

  • Senior diagnosis
  • Lean implementation
  • Documentation and handover
  • Future WordPress and content editability

Rotata
